_note: STICKER_DECAL (美国站 ATVPDKIKX0DER) 的最小可用 attributes 模板。已用此结构真实 POST 创建成功(status=ACCEPTED, issues=0, store=main=inkelligent, SKU=INK-VSP50-DRAFT01, 无图+库存0=抑制不可售)。坑1: unit_count.type.value 必须用枚举值 'Count'(大写; 合法集 ['Count','Sq Ft']), 小写 'count' 会被真实提交拒(VALIDATION_PREVIEW 反而漏判=干跑比真提交宽松)。坑2: 图片 main_product_image_locator 已去掉——Amazon 校验阶段就真实抓图, 占位/不可达图 InvalidInput 且整调用 success:false;真实公网图(CDN)就绪后再加回。brand='Inkelligent' 被接受。required_product_compliance_certificate 用 'Does Not Apply' 通过。

item_name.value: Inkelligent Vinyl Sticker Pack, 50 Pcs Waterproof Matte Stickers

title_differentiation.value: Waterproof matte vinyl stickers for laptops, bottles and journals - fade resistant, leaves no residue

bullet_point.value: PREMIUM MATTE VINYL: 50 waterproof, fade-resistant stickers with a non-reflective matte finish
DURABLE & WEATHERPROOF: UV and water resistant, leaves no residue when removed
PERFECT FOR: laptops, water bottles, notebooks, journals, planners and phone cases
EASY TO APPLY: just peel and stick on any clean, smooth surface
GREAT GIFT: a fun, thoughtful gift for teens, students and sticker lovers

product_description.value: Decorate everything you own with this 50-piece premium vinyl sticker pack. Each sticker is printed on durable, waterproof matte vinyl that resists fading, water and UV. Perfect for laptops, water bottles, notebooks, journals and more.

generic_keyword.value: vinyl stickers waterproof laptop water bottle aesthetic decals matte
